parameters.query:
WITH ct AS (
  INSERT INTO public.contacts (phone, name)
  VALUES ($1, $2)
  ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET
    name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, public.contacts.name),
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id
),
cv AS (
  INSERT INTO public.conversations (
    contact_id, chatwoot_conversation_id, chatwoot_inbox_id,
    state, ai_enabled, human_locked, assigned_team_id, current_flow
  )
  SELECT ct.id, $3::integer, $4::integer,
    'human_assigned', false, true, 1, $5
  FROM ct
  ON CONFLICT (chatwoot_conversation_id) DO UPDATE SET
    state = 'human_assigned',
    ai_enabled = false,
    human_locked = true,
    assigned_team_id = 1,
    current_flow = COALESCE($5, public.conversations.current_flow),
    updated_at = now()
  RETURNING id, contact_id
)
SELECT id AS conversation_id, contact_id FROM cv;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: 'Handoff Igor:\n\n' + ($('Validate Payload').first().json.summary || ''), message_type: 'outgoing', private: true }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, workflow_name, payload, chatwoot_conversation_id)
VALUES ('handoff_complete', 'IGOR_05_Finalize_Handoff', $1::jsonb, $2::integer);

INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, workflow_name, payload, chatwoot_conversation_id)
VALUES ('dry_run_send', 'IGOR_05_Finalize_Handoff', $1::jsonb, $2::integer);
